title: Upscale / resolution audit vs device DPR
oneline: 1024/1536 adequate; tablets overscale 1.7x but lanczos upscale buys nothing visible
summary: Playwright-measured real rendered sizes across 9 device profiles: 2x tablets display the art 1.43-1.68x above native; phones are fine (the fill is capped at renderScale=2 per ADR-0015, so only the outline img ever runs above native on 3x phones). Lanczos-2x + re-punch of dragon-wide was tested end-to-end: the combined render at worst-case display size is visually indistinguishable from shipped (diff 0.83/255) while shipping bytes grow 2.36x — the cleaner punch seams hide under the overlay lines. The pipeline's gemini-2.5-flash-image silently ignores imageSize (caps ~1MP); gemini-3-pro-image-preview at 2K returns 2528x1696, a near-exact match for the worst-case demand, at ~3.4x per-image cost. Recommendation: keep current resolution; if tablet crispness ever matters, regen outlines at 2K via a model swap — never deterministic upscale.
tried: Grounded the DPR math in the app code (overlay img at native DPR; magic-fill sheet capped at renderScale=min(DPR,2))
Playwright measurement of #coloringOverlay + canvas backing store across 9 emulated device profiles against the live dev server
Lanczos3 2x upscale of dragon-wide raw fill + outline, re-punch at 3072x2048 with the pipeline's mask+inpaint logic
Simulated worst-case display (iPad Pro 13 landscape, 2564x1709) for shipped vs upscaled pipelines and produced same-crop 2x comparisons
Probed imageConfig.imageSize on gemini-2.5-flash-image and gemini-3-pro-image-preview (2 API calls)
worked: Empirical rendered-size table: 2x tablets 1.43-1.68x above native; 3x phones 1.15-1.26x (outline only); 2x phones under native
Re-punch at 3072 runs fine (~0.2s) and yields visibly cleaner inpaint seams in the fill-only view
gemini-3-pro-image-preview honors imageSize=2K (2528x1696, near-exact worst-case match); 2.5-flash-image ignores it (1248x832)
failed: The deterministic lanczos upscale produced no visible improvement in the combined render (mean abs diff 0.83/255) — the improved seams sit exactly under the overlay line art
Regen-at-higher-res is impossible with the pipeline's current model (imageSize silently ignored)
limitations: Browser resampling approximated with sharp kernels (linear for canvas, lanczos3 for img)
Emulated profiles lack safe-area insets, so measured display sizes are upper bounds
Only light theme composited; night mode shares the geometry
Upscale path tested on one page (dragon-wide); catalog style is uniform
